explanation: Ich bin müde = I am tired.
Das Buch ist gut = the book is good.
Wir haben frei = we are off.
Sie ist nett = she is nice.
Ich höre Musik = I listen to music.
Sie ist in der Schule = she is at school.
Ich habe Zeit = I have time.
Stichhaltig means logically sound and well supported.
Substanziell means meaningful and content rich.
Fundiert means based on solid reasoning.
Differenziert means nuanced and well balanced.
Stringent means logically tight and consistent.
Einseitig means biased or one sided.
